creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
Current version of this port does not build, the distfile is not
	fetchable anymore, it moved to an `old' subdirectory when the newer
	version of Xalan-J was released (2.0.0 -> 2.0.1).

Fix: I've updated the Makefile to use the new 2.0.1 version, added the old/
	subdirectory as a master site too, just in case it ever gets outdated
	again ;-) and I've added a backup master site, being my own homepage.
	Ofcourse I did `make makesum' too and I used plist-builder to rebuild
	the pkg-plist file.

	Here's the shar file:

How-To-Repeat: 
	Try `make fetch'-ing the port java/xalan-j.
